entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `biz_type` TEXT NOT NULL, `biz_key` TEXT NOT NULL, `operation` TEXT NOT NULL, `payload` TEXT NOT NULL, `state` TEXT NOT NULL, `retry_count` INTEGER NOT NULL, `last_error` TEXT, `failure_kind` TEXT, `last_attempt_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `next_retry_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `lease_token` TEXT, `lease_expires_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updated_at` INTEGER NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_sync_outbox_biz_key
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_sync_outbox_biz_key` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`biz_key`)

indices.name: index_sync_outbox_biz_type_updated_at
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_sync_outbox_biz_type_updated_at` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`biz_type`, `updated_at`)

indices.name: index_sync_outbox_state_next_retry_at_updated_at
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_sync_outbox_state_next_retry_at_updated_at` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`state`, `next_retry_at`, `updated_at`)

indices.name: index_sync_outbox_state_lease_expires_at_updated_at
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_sync_outbox_state_lease_expires_at_updated_at` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`state`, `lease_expires_at`, `updated_at`)

indices.name: index_sync_outbox_lease_token
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_sync_outbox_lease_token` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`lease_token`)

indices.name: index_sync_outbox_updated_at
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_sync_outbox_updated_at` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`updated_at`)
